name: Colorado Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:35
Sift the dry ingredients together in a bowl. Melt the chocolate and butter in an 9 x 9 inch dish and heat in the microwave oven at full power for 1 minute. Add the dry ingredients alternately with milk to the chocolate-butter mixture, mixing everything by hand. Add vanilla. Spread the batter in a 9-inch square pan. Scatter the topping ingredients on top of the batter in the order given.
Microwave at full power for 4-5 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes.
Makes 1 cake.
Conventional range time: 30 minutes at 350°F.
